title: THE HARBOR - 211info
text: PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION THE HARBOR THE HARBOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides faith-based residential substance abuse treatment. The residential program can accommodate up to 38 men in a retreat-like setting. Residential programs begin with a 5-week assessment, stabilization, and relapse prevention program. On completion, graduates are eligible to enter a one-year holistic recovery program. Transition programs are available upon completion of a one-year holistic recovery program. 10336 NE Wygant Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older Hours: Phone hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Walk-in hours: Tuesday/Thursday 11am-1pm: Bunside Center: 111 W Burnside Street, Portland, Oregon, 97209 Email (503) 746-9664 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 746-9664 The Harbor Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or walk in at Bunside Center FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Tuberculosis card AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties. Open to interest from outlying areas. Services: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Men If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
